message:
feat: add duplicate key_id validation to threshold config and fix error propagation

Add BTreeSet-based duplicate signer key_id detection in
ThresholdConfig::validate() to prevent silently accepting configs with
repeated key IDs, which would reduce the effective signer set below the
expected threshold.

Fix verify_threshold() to extract the inner reason string from
ThresholdError::ConfigInvalid rather than wrapping it with
to_string(), which was double-prefixing the error message. Add two
corresponding tests: config_duplicate_key_ids_invalid and
invalid_config_reason_is_not_double_prefixed.

Apply rustfmt to verifier_toolkit.rs deterministic_id call site.
Update beads issue tracker timestamps.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -697,7 +697,12 @@ impl VerifierToolkit {
                 record_id: deterministic_id(
                     "vtk-audit",
                     b"verifier_toolkit_audit_id_v1:",
-                    &[run_seed, event_code, ordinal_string.as_str(), details_string.as_str()],
+                    &[
+                        run_seed,
+                        event_code,
+                        ordinal_string.as_str(),
+                        details_string.as_str(),
+                    ],
                 ),
                 event_code: event_code.to_string(),
                 timestamp: deterministic_timestamp(
